title: Wo ein Wille ist, ist auch ein Weg.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while still basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In conclusion, we will arrive at Düsseldorf Airport
five days from now at 1:40 p.m.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have completed all the paperwork and
organized a schedule for us already. I shall assist
with your preparations, so don't worry.
choice_data_list:
...Could you run that by me again from the
beginning?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Überraschung, Trainer. Or, in other
words... "Surprise!"

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Let's be off to Germany.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's surprise is so sudden that I don't
know what to say in response.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Was this too out of the blue? I had thought it
best to inform you a year in advance...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, Falcon told me it would be better as a
surprise.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Considering her expertise on how to have fun, I
decided to heed her counsel...
choice_data_list: And turned this into a surprise instead?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I already checked your schedule, so there
should not be any conflicts, but just to be sure...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Will you be available from this date to this date?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. I wish to use that period for
consultation, so please leave those dates open.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, she checked in with me about
those dates before too—but she did it so
naturally, I didn't suspect a thing...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I hope I'm not causing you any trouble with this...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My original plan three years ago was to return to
Germany immediately after finishing my races.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, as I am still running in them, I have
adjusted this to be a temporary visit.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I also had not accounted for having a travel
companion in my original plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But as we worked together, I started wanting
more and more to show you what my beloved
homeland is like.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I intended to create the most enjoyable itinerary
possible for the trip before we departed, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I failed to ascertain if you wanted to go in the
first place.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I jumped to conclusions and assumed that you
would be interested... It's a bad habit of mine.
choice_data_list: Of course I want to go.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: I'd love to see your hometown, Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Then let's get ready for the trip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Eishin Flash and I begin preparing for our
trip to Germany.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It may be a bit chilly while we are there, so I
recommend having a jacket on hand.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I believe that alone should suffice, though. My
parents said they will arrange for anything else
you may require.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They seem to be excited for your visit and are
apparently replacing old furniture in preparation
for your arrival.
choice_data_list: Th-they don't have to go that far.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I agree.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Only after leaving home did I come to understand
that my parents are not the perfect people I
believed them to be.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even so, I admire them immensely for all the
efforts they put into achieving perfection and
actually managing to do it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Perhaps you are right. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now that you have decided what to bring, all
that's left is to pack everything.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Please allow me to take care of that for you. I
assure you that your belongings will be perfectly
packed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our preparations go smoothly until finally...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Here we are. We have arrived safely at Düsseldorf
Airport. We're in Germany.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Surely you jest. After seeing how soundly
you were sleeping in the plane, I don't know if I
believe you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Besides, there is no need for nerves. You have me
with you, after all.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What other reason do you have to be nervous?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That's a relief. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, my parents should be here to meet us,
but—

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Flash! And there's her trainer!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh! There they are! Come!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Let's go!
